+----------------------------+
|  Left Group                |
|            +----------+    |
|            |  Node A  |    |
|            +-----+----+    |
|                  |         |
|          +-------+---+     |
|          |           |     |
|          |           |     |
|          v           |     |
|    +----------+      |     |
|    |  Node B  |      |     |
|    +-----+----+      |     |
|          |           |     |
|          |           |     |
|          |           |     |
+----------+-----------+-----+
           |           |
           |           |
           |           |
           |           |
    +------+-----------+---------+
    |  Right Group     |         |
    |      |           |         |
    |      |           v         |
    |      |     +----------+    |
    |      |     |  Node C  |    |
    |      |     +-----+----+    |
    |      |           |         |
    |      |           |         |
    |      +---+-------+         |
    |          |                 |
    |          v                 |
    |    +----------+            |
    |    |  Node D  |            |
    |    +----------+            |
    |                            |
    |                            |
    +----------------------------+
